---
title: "Gallery"
---

## Lab Life

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-4}
![Caption 1](assets/images/placeholder.png)
:::
::: {.g-col-4}
![Caption 2](assets/images/placeholder.png)
:::
::: {.g-col-4}
![Caption 3](assets/images/placeholder.png)
:::
:::

---

## Conferences & Events

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-4}
![Caption 4](assets/images/placeholder.png)
:::
::: {.g-col-4}
![Caption 5](assets/images/placeholder.png)
:::
::: {.g-col-4}
![Caption 6](assets/images/placeholder.png)
:::
:::
